100:6: إِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْإِ<tajweed class=ikhafa>نس</tajweed>َ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ـٰ</tajweed>نَ لِرَبِّه<tajweed class=madda_normal>ِۦ</tajweed> لَكَن<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ُو</tajweed><tajweed class=qalaqah>د</tajweed>ٌ
100:7: وَإِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َهُ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ۥ</tajweed> عَلَىٰ ذ<tajweed class=madda_normal>َٲ</tajweed>لِكَ لَشَه<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ِي</tajweed><tajweed class=qalaqah>د</tajweed>ٌ
100:8: وَإِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َهُ<tajweed class=madda_normal>ۥ</tajweed> لِحُبِّ <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْخَيْرِ لَشَد<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ِي</tajweed><tajweed class=qalaqah>د</tajweed>ٌ
100:9: ۞ أَفَلَا يَعْلَمُ إِذَا بُعْثِرَ مَا فِى <tajweed class=ham_wasl>ٱ</tajweed>لْقُب<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ُو</tajweed>رِ
100:11: إِ<tajweed class=ghunnah>نّ</tajweed>َ رَبَّه<tajweed class=ikhafa_shafawi>ُم ب</tajweed>ِهِمْ يَوْمَئِ<tajweed class=idgham_wo_ghunnah>ذٍ ل</tajweed>َّخَب<tajweed class=madda_permissible>ِي</tajweed>رُۢ
